items.title: NVO Stock Continues To Decline Pre-Market After Monday’s Crash Amid CagriSema Setback – But Tuesday Brings Some Hope From China
items.description: Developed in partnership with United Laboratories International Holdings, Novo Nordisk said that UBT251 delivered up to 19.7% mean weight loss after 2...

items.title: Michael Saylor Compares Bitcoin’s Slump To Apple, Amazon ‘Wilderness’ Years Amid MSTR’s $9B Paper Losses
items.description: In a recent interview with Natalie Brunell, Michael Saylor compared Bitcoin’s current downturn to the prolonged recovery cycles of Apple and Amazon.

items.title: Nvidia Stock Faces Earnings Test: Analysts Expect Another Blowout Report, But Some Investors Sold Off Shares Anyway
items.description: Jane Street, SoftBank, and JPMorgan are among the firms that sold sizable chunks of Nvidia stock in recent months.

items.title: IBM Defends After 13% Anthropic-Fueled Stock Drop: ‘New AI Tools Emerge Every Week,’ Cobol Modernization Challenges Remain
items.description: Anthropic unveiled new Claude functionality that can modernize COBOL code faster at scale, triggering a sharp drop in IBM stock on Monday.

items.title: Circle-Backed RedotPay Plans $1 Billion US IPO Amid Stablecoin Adoption Boom: Report
items.description: According to a Bloomberg report, Hong Kong-based RedotPay is preparing a $1 billion U.S. IPO and could seek a valuation of up to $4 billion.
